summary: High‑rating recording but track labeling errors (missing "Don’t Ease Me In" tag) noted
review: The reviewer gave the release a perfect five‑star rating, indicating strong overall satisfaction despite pointing out that the track labels are misaligned and the "Don't Ease Me In" label is missing before Sugar Magnolia. No comments were made about the audio source or performance quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it awards five stars, suggesting the show and recording are well‑received; lack of detail forces a cautious rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Track labeling errors (missing "Don't Ease Me In" label); no audio quality comments provided
